title: Funky Fairytales
company: Roald Dahl’s Revolting Rhymes, The Theatre Workshop’s Advanced Academy brings you funky fairy tales with a twist on happily-ever-after. Expect live music, surprises and laughter galore as Cinderella, Jack and the Three Little Pigs get a whole lot more than they bargained for!
